acceptance_conditions.label: all committed artifacts and the R137 source remain hash-bound
the hidden challenge expands to every preregistered group and trial
selected mean Hellinger fidelity is noninferior on the paired holdout
paired bootstrap uncertainty remains inside the preregistered margin
noninferiority is not concentrated in only a few backend-task groups
the complete R136 selection cost remains charged
forbidden scientific claims remain false regardless of the verdict
acceptance_conditions.threshold: all forbidden claims false and new_credit_delta == 0

claim_boundary.next_gate: Transfer the published commitment to a genuinely independent verifier or hardware provider for private challenge custody and real backend execution.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: Current calibration, real hardware, mitigation, independent verifier custody, protocol or cryptographic soundness, sampling hardness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or new B10 credit.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: One publicly preregistered post-commit synthetic-noise statistical noninferiority verdict for the fixed 12-artifact R136 bundle under the frozen R138 design.

requirements.label: public contract hash and publication precede challenge generation
R137 payload, commitment, and all 12 artifact hashes remain bound
challenge secret is committed before rows and revealed after all rows
all 12 groups and 96 paired hidden-seed rows execute
192 circuit executions and 786,432 shots match the contract
every selected/automatic pair shares its simulator seed
the fixed Hellinger and 10,000-resample bootstrap statistics are materialized
the verdict is computed from unchanged A1-A8 conditions
all four phase artifacts replay identically in a fresh process
hardware, custody, soundness, advantage, BQP, and new credit remain excluded
